what_was_done: Fixed wrapup code indexer performance bug — removed unconditional bulk copy of all boot collection chunks into wrapup (3093 chunks re-embedded every session, causing 5+ min delay). Made boot and wrapup collections fully independent with their own incremental git diffing.
next_steps: Build Claude API adapter for agent-bench (real API scoring)
Verify wrapup indexer runs fast after fix (restart MCP server first)
known_issues: Plan mode exit loop - platform limitation, mitigated by behavioral rule
ChromaDB concurrent access - tests skip when MCP running, correct behavior
test_framework.py Pyright import errors for shared modules (path resolution)
